# Arkova

> Arkova creates tamper-proof, independently verifiable records of your documents using cryptographic fingerprinting. Your files never leave your device.

## What Arkova Does

Arkova is a document verification platform that anchors cryptographic fingerprints of documents to a permanent, tamper-proof network. This creates immutable timestamps proving a document existed at a specific moment — without ever uploading the document itself.

## Key Capabilities

- **Privacy-First Architecture**: Documents are fingerprinted entirely in the user's browser using the Web Crypto API (SHA-256). Files never leave the device.
- **Public Verification**: Anyone can verify a credential via a shareable link or QR code — no account required.
- **AI-Powered Intelligence**: Automatic metadata extraction, credential classification, and anomaly detection using AI — while preserving document privacy through PII-stripped processing.
- **Verification API**: Programmatic credential verification via REST API. Single-call lookups, batch verification (up to 100 per call), API key management, usage analytics, and webhook notifications.
- **Proof Certificates**: Downloadable PDF proof packages with complete audit trails for compliance and legal use.
- **Bulk Processing**: CSV upload to anchor hundreds of credentials in a single batch operation.
- **Organization Tools**: Team management, credential templates, and organization-wide record management.
- **Agentic Record Keeping**: Infrastructure designed for AI agents to verify credentials programmatically — machine-verifiable, tamper-proof, and independently auditable records.

## Use Cases

- **Education**: Universities, trade schools, and bootcamps anchoring degrees, transcripts, and academic certifications.
- **Organizations**: HR departments, compliance teams, registrars, and recruiters verifying professional licenses and institutional credentials.
- **Legal & IP**: Law firms, patent offices, and notaries creating provable timestamps for contracts, patents, and intellectual property.
- **Professionals**: Freelancers, consultants, and healthcare workers verifying certifications, training records, and portfolios.

## Company Information

- **Website**: https://arkova.ai
- **Application**: https://app.arkova.ai (launching soon)
- **Company**: Arkova Technologies, Inc.
- **Contact**: hello@arkova.ai
- **LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/company/arkova
- **Twitter/X**: https://x.com/arkaboratory

## How It Works

1. **Upload & Fingerprint**: Select a document. Arkova generates a unique cryptographic fingerprint (SHA-256) in your browser. The file never leaves your device.
2. **Anchor & Secure**: The fingerprint is permanently anchored to a public, tamper-proof network, creating an immutable timestamp.
3. **Verify Anytime**: Share a verification link or QR code. Anyone can independently confirm authenticity and timestamp — no account required.

## Technical Details

- Client-side SHA-256 fingerprinting via Web Crypto API
- Zero-knowledge architecture — documents never transmitted to servers
- Immutable timestamps anchored to public networks
- Append-only audit trail
- Row-level security on all database tables
- HMAC-SHA256 API key storage
- Webhook notifications with HMAC-signed payloads
